name: Sipsey
company: Maryland Coal and Coke Company; DeBardeleben Coal Company
summary: Sipsey was founded as a coal mine and associated company town in Walker County. The mine and town were founded in 1912 by the Maryland Coal and Coke Company, bought by Henry T. DeBardeleben in 1915, and connected to the DeBardeleben Coal Company.

sources.title: Major Coal Mining Towns of the Birmingham Mineral District: 1900-1920
